# 1.4 Bill Text Versioning

Part of [Component 1 — repcheck-shared-models](../01-SHARED-MODELS.md)

Congress.gov publishes new text versions at each legislative stage (Introduced → Reported → Engrossed → Enrolled). Diffs between consecutive versions reveal changes; combined with committee data (Section 1.3), enable attribution. Current `bills` table stores one text version; separate `bill_text_versions` table stores all versions for full lifecycle tracking. Text version checks run during bill metadata sync; when `updateDateIncludingText` changes, bills-pipeline fetches new version and stores in `bill_text_versions`. `bills` table retains reference to latest version.

## Text Version Lifecycle

| Version Code | Version Type | Legislative Stage |
|-------------|-------------|-------------------|
| IH | Introduced in House | Bill filed in House |
| IS | Introduced in Senate | Bill filed in Senate |
| RH | Reported in House | Reported out of House committee |
| RS | Reported in Senate | Reported out of Senate committee |
| RFS | Referred to Senate | House bill referred to Senate |
| RFH | Referred to House | Senate bill referred to House |
| EH | Engrossed in House | Passed by House |
| ES | Engrossed in Senate | Passed by Senate |
| ENR | Enrolled Bill | Final version sent to President |
| CPH | Committee Print (House) | Committee working document |
| CPS | Committee Print (Senate) | Committee working document |

## New DOs

| Class | Table | Key Columns |
|-------|-------|-------------|
| `BillTextVersionDO` | `bill_text_versions` | versionId (UUID PK), billId (FK → bills), versionCode (`TextVersionCode` enum), versionType (full name), versionDate, formatType (`FormatType` enum), url, content (Option — full text), embedding (Option — vector), fetchedAt (Option), createdAt |
| `BillTextSectionDO` | `bill_text_sections` | sectionId (UUID PK), versionId (FK → bill_text_versions), billId (FK → bills), sectionIndex (Int), sectionIdentifier (Option[String]), heading (Option[String]), content (String), embedding (Option[Array[Float]] — 1536-dim), createdAt |

`BillTextSectionDO` stores individual sections parsed from bill XML. When decomposition pipeline parses bill's XML structure, each structural section becomes a row. Sections immutable once parsed. `embedding` enables per-section semantic search. Sections uniquely constrained on `(versionId, sectionIndex)`.

Section-to-concept-group linkage handled by `bill_concept_group_sections` junction table (§1.9). Concept groups stored in `bill_concept_groups` (§1.9), tied to text version.

## Changes to `BillDO`

Existing text fields (`textUrl`, `textFormat`, `textVersionType`, `textDate`, `textContent`, `textEmbedding`) remain for latest version quick access. New field:
- `latestTextVersionId: Option[UUID]` — FK to `bill_text_versions.version_id`, points to most recent version

When new text version stored in `bill_text_versions`, `bills` row updated to point to it and copy latest fields.

## New LLM Output Schema

| Class | Fields | Purpose |
|-------|--------|---------|
| `BillTextDiffOutput` | previousVersionCode, currentVersionCode, billId, sections: List[SectionChange], summary: String, significanceScore: Double (0.0-1.0) | Structured diff between two consecutive versions |
| `SectionChange` | sectionId: String, changeType: ChangeType, previousText: Option[String], currentText: Option[String], description: String | Section-level change |

## New Enums

| Enum | Values |
|------|--------|
| `TextVersionCode` | IH, IS, RH, RS, RFS, RFH, EH, ES, ENR, CPH, CPS (extensible) |
| `ChangeType` | Added, Removed, Modified, Renumbered |

## Event Flow

1. Bills-pipeline stores new text version in `bill_text_versions`
2. Bills-pipeline updates `bills.latest_text_version_id` and inline text fields
3. Bills-pipeline emits `bill.text.available` event with `billId`, `versionCode`, `previousVersionCode`
4. Bill-analysis-pipeline receives event, fetches both versions, runs LLM diff
5. LLM diff output stored as `BillTextDiffOutput` in `bill_findings` with `finding_type = "TextVersionDiff"`
6. Diff linked to committee membership for attribution if referral data exists

## Acceptance Criteria — 1.4

**Functional:**
1. `BillTextVersionDO` fields match `bill_text_versions` table columns
2. `BillTextVersionDO` has Doobie auto-derived `Read`/`Write` instances
3. `BillTextSectionDO` fields match `bill_text_sections` table columns
4. `BillTextSectionDO` has Doobie auto-derived `Read`/`Write` instances
5. `BillTextSectionDO.embedding` is `Option[Array[Float]]` (pgvector)
6. `BillTextSectionDO.sectionIdentifier` and `heading` are `Option[String]` (None for untitled)
7. Multiple `BillTextSectionDO` per version, uniquely constrained on `(versionId, sectionIndex)`
8. `TextVersionCode` enum covers all 11 version codes with `fromString` parser
9. `TextVersionCode.fromString` accepts code ("RH") and full name ("Reported in House"), returns same value
10. `ChangeType` enum has Circe codecs (lowercase string) and `fromString` parser
11. `BillTextDiffOutput` has Circe semi-auto derived `Decoder`/`Encoder`
12. `BillDO.latestTextVersionId` is `Option[UUID]` (None for bills with no text)
13. Existing `BillDO` text fields remain populated from latest version
14. Multiple `BillTextVersionDO` per bill, uniquely constrained on `(billId, versionCode, versionDate)`

**Error Handling:**
15. `TextVersionCode.fromString` returns `Left` with unrecognized code and valid codes list
16. `BillTextDiffOutput` decoder returns clear errors for malformed LLM JSON

**Test Requirements:**
17. Round-trip Doobie `Read`/`Write` for `BillTextVersionDO`
18. Round-trip Doobie `Read`/`Write` for `BillTextSectionDO`
19. `BillTextSectionDO` with `embedding = None` round-trips correctly
20. `BillTextSectionDO` with `sectionIdentifier = None` and `heading = None` round-trips correctly
21. Multiple sections per version with sequential `sectionIndex` round-trip correctly
22. `TextVersionCode` exhaustive parsing: every code and full name parses
23. `TextVersionCode` unknown value: verify descriptive `Left`
24. `BillTextDiffOutput` round-trip codec with populated sections
25. `BillTextDiffOutput` decode-from-LLM: sample JSON matching expected output
26. `BillDO` with `latestTextVersionId = None` represents bill with no text
27. `BillDO` with `latestTextVersionId = Some(uuid)` and populated text fields consistent
28. Circe codec round-trip for `BillTextSectionDO` (Pub/Sub serialization)
